nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to personal creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I was hesitant to relinquish control of creative aspects of my job for a long time because I love getting to be creative

nodes.label: AI as ethical boundary-respecting tool
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely approach the way I talk to the AI about the kids from a place of professionalism, and just kind of stick to first names and ages, no pictures or anything like that

nodes.label: AI as emotional support in difficult situations
nodes.label_negative: AI as emotionally absent or invalidating
nodes.grounding_span: I also receive a lot of emotional support from the AI directly as a result of this job as well

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I always think of AI as working with us and not against us, and I don't have any of those fears about job irrelevancy
